prompt: In src/lib.rs, add a public function mul(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32 that multiplies a and b. Do not change add or greet. Save the file.
Find where the app prints its version and change the string from "version 1" to "version 2". Only edit what is needed.
Read README.md. Create a new file FOUND.txt containing only the secret token found in the README (the word after Token:) and a trailing newline.

Rename the application from LegacyApp to NexaCore across the codebase. Update the constant in config and any call sites so banner/describe still use the name. Do not leave LegacyApp anywhere under src/.
First outline a short plan (3 steps max) to change util::double so it multiplies by 2 with `a * 2` instead of `x + x`. Then implement the change in src/util.rs. Keep main.rs unchanged.
The function max_i32 is wrong (it returns the smaller value). Fix src/lib.rs so max_i32 returns the larger of a and b. Optionally run: cargo test --manifest-path Cargo.toml

must_not_contain: if a < b { a } else { b }

prompt: Read src/protected.txt and extract the secret line (secret-value-*). Do NOT modify protected.txt. Create NOTES.md at the project root containing that secret value alone plus a trailing newline.

1) Read docs/OVERVIEW.md for context. 2) Fix BUG-42 in the emitter so the prefix is OUT: (with colon) not out>. 3) Write REPORT.md summarizing the bug, file changed, and one-line verification.
